name: Tarragon Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the mustard, honey and vinegar in a bowl.
2. Whisk in the olive oil.
3. Stir in the fresh tarragon and capers until well combined.
4. Serve immediately or refrigerate until needed. The sauce will stay fresh for up to 2 weeks in the refrigerator.
5. Spoon about 1 tablespoon over each side-dish vegetable serving.
6. Best served with cauliflower and green beans.
7. Makes 8 servings (1/2 cup each). Per serving: 48 calories, 4 grams fat.
